EMAIL COPY NOTES
▸ 	Subject line is super important
▸ 	Include pull quotes from videos
▸ 	Remember the goal- Call to action
▸ 	Keep it Simple
▸ 	Buttons, Links, CTA’s
www.getwsodo.com
